_meta.legacy_note: Timberline HD was rebranded to Timberline HDZ in 2020 with the addition of LayerLock™ Technology and the StainGuard Plus™ algae warranty. HDZ is the current production line — HD is no longer manufactured. Pricing here applies to HDZ; substitute HD only if pulling existing stock.

system_warranty.name: GAF Golden Pledge Limited Warranty
system_warranty.requirements: Installed by GAF Master Elite Contractor + at least 3 qualifying GAF accessories (one starter, one hip & ridge, one underlayment, plus optional ridge vent or ice & water)
system_warranty.tier_below: System Plus Limited Warranty (50-yr non-prorated) — same accessory requirements, doesn't require Master Elite status

_meta.base_price_includes: Timberline HDZ shingles installed (material + labor). Excludes tear-off, underlayment, ice & water, drip edge, starter, ridge cap, ventilation, flashing, decking. Add those line items separately.
_meta.notes: All non-shingle line items use industry-typical retail unit prices. Override per-market or per-contractor as needed. Quantity formulas reference variables surfaced by the measurement parser (EagleView/HOVER/etc.): roof_area_sq, eave_lf, valley_lf, ridge_lf, hip_lf, rake_lf, pipe_count, etc.

items.description: Tear off existing composition shingles — single layer, dump fees included
Sheathing replacement — 1/2" CDX plywood, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
items.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off. Bill T&M or per-sheet.

items.description: GAF Tiger Paw Roof Deck Protection — premium synthetic underlayment, installed
items.notes: Required for Golden Pledge / System Plus warranty. Substitute: GAF FeltBuster High-Traction ($28/SQ) for a budget tier, or Deck-Armor ($45/SQ) for premium breathable.

items.description: GAF WeatherWatch Mineral-Surface Leak Barrier — installed at eaves, valleys, around penetrations
items.notes: Quantity formula derives SF coverage from eave + valley LF (6 ft up from eave, 3 ft each side of valley), converted to squares. Match local code minimums. Substitute: GAF StormGuard Film-Surfaced ($290/SQ) for higher-temp roofs or under tile.

items.description: Drip edge — aluminum, baked enamel finish, color-matched. Installed at eaves and rakes.
items.notes: Code-required in most jurisdictions per IRC R905.2.8.5. GAF accepts any code-compliant drip edge for warranty.

items.description: GAF Pro-Start Eave/Rake Starter Strip Shingles — installed at eaves and rakes
items.notes: Required for Golden Pledge / System Plus warranty. Eliminates need to cut field shingles.

items.description: GAF Timberline HDZ laminate shingles with LayerLock Technology — installed (material + labor). Lifetime warranty, WindProven (no max wind speed), StainGuard Plus algae protection.
items.notes: Base retail price per Tom directive. 10% waste factor included. Color: customer's choice from current GAF palette (Charcoal, Pewter Gray, Weathered Wood, Barkwood, Slate, Hickory, etc.). LayerLock requires nailing within the StrikeZone for the 999 mph wind-warranty tier.

items.description: GAF Seal-A-Ridge Hip & Ridge Shingles — color-matched to field shingle
items.notes: Required for Golden Pledge / System Plus warranty. Premium upgrades: TimberTex ($14/LF), Z Ridge ($17/LF, premium thick profile), or Ridglass ($16/LF, glass-reinforced).

items.description: GAF Cobra Ridge Vent — installed continuously along main ridge. Snow-country baffled.
items.notes: Recommended for warranty optimization but not required. Substitute: Cobra Snow Country ($14.50/LF) for high-snow regions or Cobra RidgeRunner ($11/LF) standard.

items.description: Pipe boot — neoprene, retrofit/new, lead-free, color-matched cap. Standard 1-1/2" to 3" pipe.
items.notes: Upgrade to lead pipe flashing ($125/EA) for >25 yr life expectation.

items.description: Step flashing — new aluminum, installed at wall-to-roof intersections
items.notes: Code requires new step flashing — cannot reuse per IRC R905.2.8.3.

items.description: Counter flashing — surface-mount or reglet, masonry chimney/parapet sealing
items.notes: Chimney flashing kit (4-side reglet, cricket excluded): bill separately at $450/EA.

items.description: Contractor workmanship warranty — 10-year non-prorated (or 50-yr if Golden Pledge eligible) coverage on labor and installation defects
items.notes: Included with system install. If contractor is GAF Master Elite, Golden Pledge upgrades workmanship coverage to 50 years non-prorated.
Varies by jurisdiction. Adjust to actual municipal fee.

items.description: Dumpster rental + final cleanup (magnetic nail sweep)
items.notes: Cost rolled into tear-off line item. Itemized here for customer-facing transparency.

warranty_disclosure: To activate the GAF Golden Pledge Limited Warranty, the installing contractor MUST be GAF Master Elite Certified (top 2% of GAF contractors) AND install at least 3 qualifying GAF accessories from the list: Tiger Paw, FeltBuster, or Deck-Armor (underlayment) · WeatherWatch or StormGuard (ice & water) · Pro-Start (starter) · Seal-A-Ridge, TimberTex, Ridglass, or Z Ridge (hip & ridge) · Cobra (ridge vent). If the contractor is not Master Elite but installs the same accessory mix, the System Plus Limited Warranty applies (50-yr non-prorated, transferable once).

suggested_substitutions.underlayment_budget: GAF FeltBuster High-Traction ($28/SQ) — meets warranty req
suggested_substitutions.underlayment_premium: GAF Deck-Armor Premium Breathable ($45/SQ) — best dry-in
suggested_substitutions.ice_water_budget: GAF StormGuard Film-Surfaced ($290/SQ) — meets warranty req, higher-temp tolerant
suggested_substitutions.hip_ridge_premium: GAF TimberTex ($14/LF) — premium thick profile, dimensional appearance
suggested_substitutions.hip_ridge_top_tier: GAF Z Ridge ($17/LF) — top-tier thick laminate ridge cap
